videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição Today we're going to spend the night at the world's largest inflatable course. These inflatables are part of Enaldinho's Crazy Race, an event that's touring all over Brazil and has 10 giant inflatable obstacles. To join in this video, I decided to invite 4 friends. But instead of pajamas, we'll be wearing these shirts, which are exactly the ones that participants in my race will get. And before we head out, let's divide and conquer to grab everything we need for this challenge. I was just thinking here, and one of the most important things for making a cool tent or camp is a good structure, like, for example, sheets! So I'm going to grab a few here that will be essential for setting up our camp. Besides the sheets, I think something extremely important are cushions and pillows to make it way more comfortable there! I think this way, the setup will be perfect. Something super important that I think is cool to bring is some stuff for our entertainment! I'm going to grab the crazy tower, also this trophy grabber, and some other things that might be interesting to take. I need to ensure we have lighting to get through the night, since everything gets dark then. In this storage, there are some Christmas decorations, and Christmas always has lights. And here I have a LED light. Since it's battery-powered, it'll be easy to use it outside. Inside this drawer, there are some flashlights that I'll grab to help us move around. If you want to see me stressed out, just let me get hungry, dude. So, the first thing I thought of bringing is food. And one of the things I absolutely love about this pantry is Enaldinho's munchies. I'm going to grab one of each flavor so everyone can dig in as much as they like, especially since we're crashing there for the night and hanging out for a while. And on top of the snacks, I reckon it's absolutely essential to bring some water as well. We've just arrived at the place where the Crazy Race inflatables are set up. Right off the bat, this is the Start, the first inflatable here. Since these inflatables are part of a race, there's a minimum distance between each. But from above, you can get a sense of the size of the course and how cool the inflatables are. Wow, Enaldinho, that's awesome, dude. But at least we have some time before it gets dark, right? That's true, we can explore a bit before setting up camp. I'm heading over to that one. Me too. And we all split up! I'll start by exploring this inflatable, which is simply the Start. This inflatable is a bit challenging to climb. Just look at the height of this place. Here's the staircase section and here's the slide section. And since we have some time, I see no problem in sliding here. 3, 2, 1, go! It's clear that this Overnight Adventure is going to be one of the coolest in the channel's history. I'll start by testing this toy, which caught my attention because of its height. And this is the starting point. Let's climb up step by step. I've reached the top. And I'm a bit tired too.
